/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -fPIC -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/toluapp_lib.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libtoluapp.so -o ../../../Debug/libtoluapp.so CMakeFiles/toluapp_lib.dir/src/lib/tolua_event.c.o CMakeFiles/toluapp_lib.dir/src/lib/tolua_is.c.o CMakeFiles/toluapp_lib.dir/src/lib/tolua_map.c.o CMakeFiles/toluapp_lib.dir/src/lib/tolua_push.c.o CMakeFiles/toluapp_lib.dir/src/lib/tolua_to.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/ptusa_main/ptusa_main/build-debug/Debug: ../../../Debug/liblua.so -lm -Wl,-Bstatic -ldl -Wl,-Bdynamic
